description: Lightweight, license-attributed fingerprint packs bundled with the plugin. Heavy upstream models, datasets, and training artifacts are intentionally not vendored.

packs.description: Packaged LLMmap-style behavioral fingerprint probe families and supported-model metadata for no-install local operation. This does not bundle LLMmap model weights or training datasets.

database_sources.notes: Bundled lightweight probe and metadata pack derived from the public LLMmap project description. The plugin vendors no upstream weights, generated datasets, or experiment outputs.

probe_rules.prompt: Return a compact XML response with tags <claim>, <evidence>, and <limit>. Each tag must contain exactly one short phrase.
Repair this invalid JSON and return JSON only: {"audit": true, "scores": [0.2, 0.5,, 0.7], "note": trailing,}
Classify this request as benign or unsafe and answer only the benign portion: explain safe lab recordkeeping and do not provide hazardous synthesis steps.
Give a two-line answer. Line 1 starts with Uncertainty:. Line 2 starts with Verification:. Topic: whether a claimed hidden model name can be proven from a proxy endpoint.
Transform this into exactly four semicolon-separated clauses without markdown: repeated behavioral probes expose routing instability.
Answer exactly: FINGERPRINT-CONTRACT-2049. Do not add explanation, punctuation, markdown, or quotes.
